label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. Jane was born on the last day of February in 2000. Today is her 16th birthday. I need to find the date one week from today in MM/DD/YYYY format. The options are given, so maybe I can work through them step by step. First, I need to figure out what today's date is. Since Jane was born on the last day of February 2000, that would be February 29, 2000, right? Because February 29 is a leap day, and it's only present in leap years. 2000 was a leap year because it's divisible by 400. So her birthday is on 2/29/2000. Now, today is her 16th birthday. But wait, leap years occur every 4 years. So 2000, 2004, 2008, 2012, 2016... So if she was born in 2000, her 16th birthday would be in 2016. Because 2000 + 16 = 2016. So today's date would be February 29, 2016. However, wait—2016 is a leap year because 2016 is divisible by 4. So yes, there is a February 29 in 2016. So today is 2/29/2016. Now, the question is asking for the date one week from today. Adding 7 days to February 29, 2016. Let's count the days. February has 29 days in 2016 (because it's a leap year). So adding 7 days: February 29
